stemHtml: While en route to the destination, the pilot in command conducts a briefing on the proper approach procedure, while the copilot keeps a close eye on altitude and speed during the approach. Nevertheless, as they approach for landing, the speed unintentionally exceeds the required speed specified in the published approach procedure. This specific situation serves as an illustration of...

options.a: A handling error by the commander, communication error by the co-pilot.
options.b: A handling error by the commander, procedural error by the co-pilot.
options.c: A procedural error by the commander, communication error by the co-pilot.
